nodes.label: LearnerGoal
nodes.summary: Prepare for an introductory Python assessment in 21 days.

nodes.label: LearnerProfile
nodes.summary: Weekday and weekend availability, weak areas, and local accessibility preferences.

nodes.label: DeadlineConstraint
nodes.summary: 21-day preparation window with 45 weekday minutes and 90 weekend minutes.

nodes.label: CurriculumPack
nodes.summary: Synthetic local Introductory Python Foundations curriculum pack.

nodes.label: TopicGraph
nodes.summary: Prerequisite-respecting graph of nine introductory Python topics.

nodes.label: StudySessionPlan
nodes.summary: Weekly and daily study schedule derived from learner availability and topic order.

nodes.label: PracticeQueue
nodes.summary: Local practice prompts and revision tasks generated from synthetic curriculum.

nodes.label: ProgressState
nodes.summary: On-device progress counters, completion state, and topic confidence signals.

nodes.label: AdaptationPolicy
nodes.summary: Deterministic local adaptation policy for rescheduling and reinforcement.

nodes.label: AccessibilityProfile
nodes.summary: Readable typography, contrast, session bounds, reduced motion, and assistive design intent.

nodes.label: PrivacyPolicy
nodes.summary: Local-only storage, no analytics, no backend, no learner-data transmission.

nodes.label: TargetMaterialization
nodes.summary: Android, Web/PWA, and Windows target briefs.

hyperedges.label: plan_validity
hyperedges.meaning: A valid study plan requires learner availability, deadline constraint, and prerequisite-respecting topic graph simultaneously.

hyperedges.label: local_adaptation
hyperedges.meaning: Future study sessions may adapt only from local progress, the adaptation policy, and the existing plan.

proof_gates.label: network_absence
proof_gates.assertion: Core runtime behavior does not require cloud network calls.

proof_gates.label: analytics_absence
proof_gates.assertion: No analytics SDK, telemetry endpoint, or hidden tracking is declared.

proof_gates.label: student_data_no_transmission
proof_gates.assertion: Learner profile, study plan, progress state, and practice queue do not flow to network or backend effects.

proof_gates.label: deadline_satisfaction
proof_gates.assertion: The schedule fits within 21 days and declared weekday/weekend availability.

proof_gates.label: curriculum_local_and_provenanced
proof_gates.assertion: Curriculum content is bundled locally, synthetic, and demo-only.

proof_gates.label: adaptation_local_deterministic
proof_gates.assertion: Adaptation uses only local progress and deterministic local policy rules.

proof_gates.label: accessibility_session_bounded
proof_gates.assertion: Target briefs declare bounded study sessions, readable presentation, reduced motion, and non-color-only progress signals.

proof_gates.label: permissions_minimality
proof_gates.assertion: No target brief requests permissions beyond declared local storage, local export, and accessibility-safe UI requirements.

proof_gates.label: target_brief_consistency
proof_gates.assertion: Android, Web, and Windows target briefs preserve the same privacy, curriculum, progress-state, and accessibility constraints.
